title: Apollo
summary: Apollo is modular and can be mounted to any mobility platform, stationary, or fully mobile with legs.

title: Press Release
summary: Former Waymo, Boston Dynamics, and Amazon Leaders Join Apptronik; Dan Chu appointed as Chief Product Officer, alongside senior leaders across software, services, marketing, and people operations

title: In the News
summary: Apptronik has raised $520 million in funding at a $5 billion valuation as the startup aims to commercialize its humanoid Apollo robots, potentially beating Chinese competitors and Tesla’s Optimus to the market.
